findings.evidence: `rg -n "\bchange\b|\bshow\b" code/TauCeti/Analysis/Semigroups` reports `Basic.lean:258`, `Basic.lean:189`, `Basic.lean:332`, and `Resolvent.lean:56,186,300,301,303`; none document why `show` is needed.
findings.fix: Replace these with named `have`/lemma rewrites or add local comments explaining why the goal cannot be reached by `rw`/`simp`/`ring_nf` without the type ascription.
findings.issue: Undocumented `show` uses remain in proof scripts, including nontrivial target reshaping in `strongContWithinAt` and nested scalar rewrites in `resolvent_generator_tendsto`.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "genQuot_tendsto_add|genQuot_tendsto_smul|genQuot" .../Generator.lean` shows the helper lemmas only at lines 52 and 66, while the duplicated quotient rewrites appear again at lines 85-107 and 124-150.
findings.fix: Define `domain` via `IsInGeneratorDomain`/`genQuot` and reuse these helper lemmas in `add_mem'`, `smul_mem'`, `map_add'`, and `map_smul'`.
findings.issue: `genQuot_tendsto_add` and `genQuot_tendsto_smul` are proved but then the domain and generator linearity proofs repeat the same raw quotient algebra inline.

summary: The proofs still contain undocumented `show` target-shaping rewrites, and the generator proof repeats difference-quotient linearity instead of using the helper lemmas already introduced for it.
